title: Test onCreateView initializes components correctly
test_steps: ["Launch the app and navigate to the HomeFragment.", "Verify that the speedTextView is initialized."]

title: Test handleButtonClick starts a trip
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and no trip is active"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment.", "Click the buttonStartTrip.", "Verify that the button icon changes to 'stop'.", "Verify that a toast message 'Tragitto avviato!' is displayed."]
expected_result: ["buttonStartTrip icon is changed to 'stop'.", "Toast message 'Tragitto avviato!' is displayed."]

title: Test handleButtonClick ends a trip
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and a trip is active"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment and start a trip.", "Click the buttonStartTrip.", "Verify that the button icon changes to 'start'.", "Verify that a toast message 'Tragitto terminato!' is displayed."]
expected_result: ["buttonStartTrip icon is changed to 'start'.", "Toast message 'Tragitto terminato!' is displayed."]

title: Test loadDailyCO2 fetches CO2 data successfully
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and user is logged in"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment.", "Wait for the daily CO2 data to be fetched.", "Verify that the CO2 display is updated."]
expected_result: ["CO2 display is updated with the fetched data."]

title: Test loadDailyCO2 handles user not logged in
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and user is not logged in"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment.", "Wait for the daily CO2 data to be fetched.", "Verify that an error message is displayed."]
expected_result: ["Error message 'Errore: utente non loggato' is displayed."]

title: Test saveTripToDatabase saves trip data successfully
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and a trip is ended"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment and end a trip.", "Wait for the trip data to be saved.", "Verify that a success message is displayed."]
expected_result: ["Success message 'Tragitto salvato con successo!' is displayed."]

title: Test saveTripToDatabase handles user not logged in
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and user is not logged in"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment and end a trip.", "Wait for the trip data to be saved.", "Verify that an error message is displayed."]
expected_result: ["Error message 'Errore: Utente non loggato!' is displayed."]

title: Test loadDailyTrips fetches trip data successfully
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and user is logged in"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment.", "Wait for the daily trip data to be fetched.", "Verify that trip cards are populated."]
expected_result: ["Trip cards are populated with the fetched data."]

title: Test loadDailyTrips handles user not logged in
preconditions: ["Fragment is created and user is not logged in"]
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment.", "Wait for the daily trip data to be fetched.", "Verify that an error message is displayed."]
expected_result: ["Error message 'Errore: utente non loggato' is displayed."]

title: Test onDestroyView cleans up resources
test_steps: ["Navigate to the HomeFragment and destroy it.", "Verify that binding is set to null."]
